content: Extension auth to SaaS backend: email/password login in side panel -> backend issues access token (short-lived JWT) + refresh token; store in chrome.storage.local (session-scoped chrome.storage.session for access token is safer); refresh before requests with ~60s clock-skew buffer; on revocation clear storage and flip UI to signed-out. All API calls include Bearer token; token validation server-side maps user->tenant.
